name: Chocolate-Cinnamon Cake Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Line a jelly roll pan, 15.5 x 10.5 x 1 inch, with aluminum foil or waxed paper and grease generously.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat eggs on high speed until thick and lemon-colored, about 5 minutes. Pour into a larger mixing bowl.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until foamy.
5. Beat in water and 1 tsp of liqueur on low speed.
6. Gradually incorporate flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt until just combined.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for 12-15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and loosen cake from the edges of the pan. Invert onto a towel sprinkled with cocoa powder.
9. Carefully remove foil, trim stiff edges if necessary, and roll up tightly from the narrow end.
10. Allow to cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes.
11. Unroll the cake, remove the towel, and sprinkle with liqueur.
12. Roll up again, sprinkle with cocoa powder if desired, and refrigerate until serving.
Note: Cinnamon Whipped Cream is made by beating all ingredients in a chilled bowl until stiff before assembly.
